title: Sri Nandi Publications: Textbook Creation & Distribution Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the collaborative process and information flow between authors, editors, designers, and distributors in creating and delivering a data structures textbook.
relationships: Editors review and return to Authors for revision
Finalized content is sent to Designers for typesetting
Designed proofs are sent to Printing & Distribution
Finished books are distributed to Students & Educators
